hero.title: Build, Automate & Scale Your Business With Elite Digital Solutions
hero.subtitle: Shopify stores, AI chatbots, custom web apps, mobile products, and enterprise automation — delivered by verified DEWEB suppliers with transparent pricing and milestone escrow.

grid.title: Custom Web Applications
grid.desc: Scalable web apps with modern stacks, APIs, and admin dashboards.

grid.title: Mobile App Development
grid.desc: iOS, Android, and cross-platform apps with polished UX.

grid.title: Marketplace Development
grid.desc: Multi-vendor platforms with bidding, escrow, and supplier dashboards.

grid.title: Telegram & Discord Bots
grid.desc: Community bots, sales automation, and support on messaging platforms.

grid.title: UI/UX Design
grid.desc: Product design, design systems, and high-fidelity prototypes.

grid.title: Branding & Identity
grid.desc: Logos, brand guidelines, and visual identity for digital products.

grid.title: SEO & Growth
grid.desc: Technical SEO, content strategy, and conversion optimization.

grid.title: AI Agent Automation
grid.desc: Intelligent workflows, CRM sync, and autonomous business operations.

process.title: Free Consultation
process.desc: Share your goals, budget, and timeline. We scope the project and match you with specialists.

process.title: Supplier Bidding
process.desc: Verified DEWEB suppliers submit competitive offers with pricing, portfolios, and delivery plans.

process.title: Project Planning
process.desc: Choose your supplier, define milestones, and lock terms with escrow-backed DEWEB payments.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Build in sprints with transparent progress, reviews, and direct communication.

process.title: Launch & Growth
process.desc: Deploy, hand off documentation, and scale with ongoing support and optimization.
